name: Death of President Raisi in Helicopter Crash
description: President [Ebrahim Raisi](/people/ebrahim-raisi), Foreign Minister [Hossein Amir-Abdollahian](/people/hossein-amir-abdollahian), and six others died when their Bell 212 helicopter crashed in a fog-covered mountainous area near Jolfa in East Azerbaijan Province on 19 May 2024. The crash triggered a constitutional provision requiring a snap presidential election within fifty days. First Vice President [Mohammad Mokhber](/people/mohammad-mokhber) served as acting president. [Masoud Pezeshkian](/people/masoud-pezeshkian) was elected as successor on 5 July 2024.
editorial_notes: Also killed: Foreign Minister Amir-Abdollahian. Triggered snap election won by Pezeshkian.
